issues.description: Independent test verification failed. evidence_bundle.independent_tests.tests_passed is false, and the test_output_summary shows 'I'll run the test command for you.' instead of valid pytest output with test results. The independent test runner did not produce confirmation that pytest ran successfully.
issues.suggestion: The independent test verification infrastructure may have an issue. The test command 'pytest tests/unit/test_settings.py -v --tb=short' needs to execute and produce valid pytest output showing all tests passing. This is the same issue from Turn 1 - the independent verification mechanism is not completing successfully.

issues.description: Files listed in files_created (.env.example, src/fleet_memory/settings.py, tests/unit/test_settings.py) show no git changes in Turn 2, suggesting they were created in Turn 1 and not modified this turn.
issues.suggestion: In future reports, distinguish between files created in previous turns versus current turn. For Turn 2, if no files were modified, files_modified and files_created should be empty arrays.

criteria_verification.notes: Player provides detailed evidence that Settings class exports all required fields with correct types and defaults. However, verification command not independently executed by evidence bundle.
Evidence bundle requirements.criteria_results confirms empty-string validation raises ValidationError. Mapped as evidence AC-002.
Evidence bundle requirements.criteria_results confirms .env.example has mac-dev and test blocks, all FLEET_MEMORY_ fields, postgresql:// DSN format, and ASSUM placeholders. Mapped as evidence AC-001.

Independent test verification failed. evidence_bundle.independent_tests.tests_passed = false with output 'I'll run the test command for you.' This is not valid pytest output. While evidence_bundle.tests.all_passed = true, I must treat independent_tests as authoritative per instructions.
Evidence bundle requirements.criteria_results confirms empty-string validation for pg_dsn and embed_url raises ValidationError. Same as AC-002 verification.
Evidence bundle requirements.criteria_results confirms settings.py has no NATS, httpx, or psycopg imports. Mapped as evidence AC-003.
Evidence bundle requirements.criteria_results confirms all files pass ruff lint/format checks. Mapped as evidence AC-004.

rationale: Cannot approve due to independent test verification failure (evidence_bundle.independent_tests.tests_passed = false). This is the authoritative test signal that must be honored. The test output 'I'll run the test command for you.' indicates the independent pytest run did not execute properly or produce valid results. This same issue was flagged in Turn 1 and persists in Turn 2. While 6 of 7 acceptance criteria are verified, AC-004 (tests must pass) is rejected due to failed independent verification.
